title: pelargonium ternatum
intro: Pelargonium ternatum, also known as the Red Form of South African Sage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Pelargonium ternatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
